item.title: Never forget that Brock Turner is a rapist
item.description: I will repost this whenever I remember that Brock Turner is a rapist. I hope his dad knows that I will never stop talking about his son being a rapist. Btw Brock's swim times were shit. Edit: Now legally known as "Allen Turner" due to name change! (Fun fact Allen is/was his middle name. He just removed his first name) Edit edit: damn I wasn't expecting this to get that much attention after a few years. Glad everyone still remembers that Brock (AKA Allen) Turner is a rapist.

item.title: US women's hockey team standing ten toes in dignity
item.description: Edit: thank you for checking this out. A LOT of comments had downplayed that the men's team wasn't being sexist. Individual sexism, institutional sexism, and structural sexism are all different. Structural sexism is insisting there's no rot that needs to be cut out. Yes gender is a social construct. And humans are social creatures
item.dc:creator: theSoulciologist

26 Imgur Creator Spotlight: @StealThisRepost painted these models and did an incredible job! Check out their other posts for more.
27 Man tax: Maluma
“Those who don’t know how to weep with their whole heart don’t know how to laugh either.” - Golda Meir So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, play trivia twice a week, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. We also have Jack Box game night and are setting up movie night! Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ I'm also on the imgcat server for updates & fun: https://discord.gg/TpjD37jgJ9 ***Also if you miss abbiistabbii's discord community good news! Here's the new one https://discord.gg/NPStJGgARq - where everyone's reconnecting, shitposting, and hanging out again*** https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator Unable to work, zero income. Feel free to leave me a tip. Those that have, y'all are the bee's knees. You've honestly been my lifeline. ***Tag me if you see an artist/creator you like whose work isn't getting seen as much as it should be! Or if you are an artist/creator and want me to post something of yours, DM me
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

item.title: Dr. Oz announces National Moratorium on all Durable Medical Equipment (DME) – Republican healthcare plan: Just die already
item.description: Durable Medical Equipment (DME) also includes prescribed, reusable items – like wheelchairs, oxygen tanks, walkers, and hospital beds – designed for long-term home use to assist with chronic conditions or injuries.

item.title: It Is Wednesday
item.description: to all who count the days or already lost it
item.dc:creator: Ngugi

item.title: I want to live in a world where landlords don’t exist
item.description: Landlords and other rent seekers in our economy are the enemy, not your neighbours | (update) to all the liberals who keep saying “it’s just the corporations” No, no landlords at all should exist. Housing shouldn’t be a commodity rented or sold on the market. Just like healthcare shouldn’t be a for profit venture either. I don’t care if your grandma was a nice landlord or whatever cope BS you wanna puke into my comment section it doesn’t matter. So long as there’s a housing crisis and there’s literally people dying on the streets there shouldn’t be landlords. Just find other less toxic ways to make money. Hell, buy commercial real estate if you want. We have a mixed economy here in North America, I think Housing should be on the other side of the equation. Sorry
item.dc:creator: McKittyNuts

item.title: Aww
item.dc:creator: DOcelot1

item.title: Class Participation
item.dc:creator: Kyzyl

item.title: Scorpions farms exist. Each scorpion produces about 2 milligrams of venom daily, which is milked using a pair of tweezers and tongs. A liter is worth up to $39 million, used for cosmetics and medicines
item.description: Up to $39 million per liter ($10,300,000 per quart). Because the yield per animal is so microscopic, it would take roughly 2.6 million milkings to fill a single gallon.
item.dc:creator: CitizenK9

item.title: 21 nice and wholesome things to brighten your day, vol 202
item.description:
Coco has no idea what's going on, he's just happy to be included. ~u/Grouchy-Fig7242
~u/UnreadIntentions
~u/Traroten
I pulled her out of a dumpster eight years ago, now she sleeps tucked under a blanket on a throne fit for a queen. ~u/PzykoHobo
It's okay that you're not who you thought you would be
That concludes today's post. I could really use some help. If you can, please support me at: https://ko-fi.com/hoopsnek Thank you.
item.dc:creator: hoopsnek

item.title: Everything that guy just said is bullshit
item.description: https://bsky.app/profile/atrupar.com/post/3mfpbn4q7s722 But that’s not going to stop Fox News from brute forcing this into reality. This guy gives off shady used car salesmen mixed with a sex pest pastor vibes, and is a lying piece of shit, which is why he is on Fox to do the “what the president means” routine. For the rest of the sane Americans, (in case you are unaware) there has been a double digit percentage increase in energy prices since data centers started propping up. Stolen from comments in that clip: https://www.eesi.org/articles/view/data-center-power-demands-are-contributing-to-higher-energy-bills This administration also dismantled and rolled back most of the renewable energy plans and concessions. Meanwhile their favorite scapegoat, China, is doubling and tripling down on renewable sources. But noooo china bad so we must do the opposite and open up oil reserves in protected regions to become “energy independent”. I fucking hate this timeline
item.dc:creator: DownvotesStarWars

item.title: “Ginger Rogers did everything Fred Astaire did, but backwards in high heels…”
item.dc:creator: 77thtimesthecharm

item.title: The Return of the Meme (vol. 673. FLASHBACK EDITION)
item.description:
[Author and editor's note: all text after these parentheses is from the original dump. This was in my hidden posts from way back. I cannot remember if it got posted or not. So enjoy this flashback from when I lived in Chateau d'Blackmold, had a mouse problem, and had somewhat more hope in life overall!] The day begins because the sun rises and the earth rotates, and that is NOT a mouse I hear knocking on the wall. Has to be a Gila Woodpecker. @sisipherr sent a messenger for some bread.
Since once again I have no tours this morning, I decided to sneak some of my favorite Mexican Whiskey into this morning's coffee, and I have powdered sugar donuts...
It's adorable when Pippin double-checks to see if his feets are there.
I had a dream that I went 200 years into the future for grad school round two. I didn't realize that I was in Boston until I found the ruins of the seminary I did my first grad degree in, preserved as a historical site. Apparently there had been a nuclear exchange and civilization changed... it wasn't QUITE Star Trek (no warp travel), but there were colonies through the Solar System, and Education was free. I was taking classes to catch up on all that happened in the intervening 200 years.
Yeah, this list checks out.
Poor Stegosaurus, it needs love.
A mood, but so far not today's.
We hates them
Stupid bipolar.
Also in meiji-era Arizona. As many of y'all are aware, I dress like one for work.
Poor black vultures
It SNOWED last night in Sedona, while I was there with Pippin to go to the improv comedy group. It's been unusual to get snow in October out here...
That ADHD life.
I am both terrified and excited about whoever I end up dating next. She's gonna have to be this weird to be with me....
Grumpy Goth Yee Haw here.
Always amusing when people claim giants existed via Mesopotamian art. No, you depicted kings larger because they were important .. not because they were giants.
I have a bunch of these still to post, so deal with it
The cleaning went okay... until my vacuum died, but at least I got my living room mostly done. The war against the Mice is so far going well... caught my sixth overnight. No idea yet if there's still more.. .
Mood.
Square sea star is cute
I guess I'm heading into another bipolar high.
Oops, meant to save this for a LOTR dump.
Hmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmm
A rare LOTR and Mass Effect crossover.
I may be a Hobbit next year
Don't ask me to tie shoes.
Wine acidity, that is.
Trying to get into this attitude more...
You only have to deal with today once. Be an alive cowboy. Take your meds and drink some water. It's okay to cry.
Hahaha
I had a kid obsessed with Paleontology on a tour Wednesday. It was awesome. Even more excitingly, they were obsessed with the Cambrian and Devonian. I told them we needed more paleontologists working there, especially the Devonian. They were happy I knew how to pronounce Tiiktalik! Good tour. [Author's Edit: this obsession, as you all know, has gotten worse.]
Pippin Tax! Today's message from Pippin: (while sitting on my head) "Ta da! I love you. Hey Pippin. Chirp." Be kind to yourself. You are loved, wanted, and good. Vote! [Author's note: this was before I had a closing image! Hope you all enjoy this blast from the past i found while editing a paleoart dump.]
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: Unregulated gambling for teens bought to you by Tump
item.description:
https://www.instagram.com/fubarpac How the fuck is wagering on outcomes of events "trading"? These aren't stocks that let you support companies and let your money grow if the company gains value. There is no good or serve being produced
I google images searched "polymarket wadgers" to find a quick example. This is the "trades" happening on Polymarket. You can put money on yes or no for "Trump signs national abortion ban" etc. It's all betting, not "trades".
item.dc:creator: DropDrop
